title: Feature Request: Enhanced Admin Tools for Board and Workspace Management
excerpt:
As an admin managing a large volume of boards and workspaces, it would be incredibly helpful to have the following functionalities: 

Mass Board Management: The ability to delete or archive multiple boards at once direct…

posts.author: ProjectMastermind (IngenuityKat)
posts.cookedHtml:
As an admin managing a large volume of boards and workspaces, it would be incredibly helpful to have the following functionalities:

  1. Mass Board Management: The ability to delete or archive multiple boards at once directly from the admin interface. This would save significant time when handling a large number of boards.
  2. Workspace Management: Options to delete or rename workspaces from the admin dashboard for better organization and maintenance.

As a new admin, I’ve inherited over 1,300 boards, and half of them need to be deleted or archived. I’ve been working on this since January, but it’s a daunting task to manage in chunks. Having these tools would be a game-changer for admin efficiency.

Thank you!

posts.author: arun.paudyal (Arun Paudyal [Decadis AG])
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Kate (@ProjectMastermind),

I’m Arun from Decadis AG, and as a monday marketplace partner, we understand exactly what you’re going through. Managing 1300+ boards? That’s superhero territory – and every superhero deserves the right tools! That’s why we have created — Batch Hero for monday!

With Batch Hero, you can perform:

  • Column Ops: smart column management – Effortlessly add, duplicate, or remove columns across multiple boards instantly.
  • Board Ops: streamlined board operations – Move, copy, archive, delete, or change ownership of multiple boards with just a few clicks.
  • Quick actions: Quickly create or rename boards, plus filter and sort them with lightning speed.
  • Control panel for boards: Take your board management to the next level. Access key board information from one convenient, centralized location.

Ready to make board administration enjoyable? Let me show you how Batch Hero can save you hours each week!

And the best part? The app is still free !

While we are still researching to integrate the workspace management, Batch Hero already transforms those tedious admin tasks into smooth, quick operations.

Give it a try: Batch Hero for monday - monday.com App Marketplace

If you have further questions or would like to discuss your requirements with us, do not hesitate to reach out!

Best,
Arun
